about.v1Desc: Bold aesthetics and clean details for every season.
about.v2Desc: Pieces designed to fit seamlessly into daily life.
about.v3Desc: Sizes from S to 6XL — made for everyone.
about.v4Desc: Attention to every detail to meet the highest standards.
about.v5Desc: We've built a community connected by shared love for style.
about.v6Desc: Clothing that reflects your personality and builds confidence.
about.philosophyBody: Our story started with a simple idea: Clothing should be more than something you wear every day — it should reflect personality, inspire confidence, and stay effortlessly simple.
about.definesBody: We believe simplicity is the strongest form of style. That's why we create pieces that combine bold aesthetics, clean details, and everyday comfort. Every product we design carries a clear purpose: to feel easy to wear, meaningful, and naturally part of daily life.
about.quote: This story is only getting started… Everyone who wears our products becomes part of it.
about.visionBody: Over time, our vision grew from a small idea into a brand focused on creating fashion and accessories for everyone. By focusing on quality, visual identity, and customer trust, we've built more than a brand — we've built a community connected by a shared love for clean and timeless style.

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: We respond via WhatsApp the same day.
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us how we can help…
contact.subject: Message from website

sections.heading: When We Accept Returns
sections.body: Returns are accepted exclusively in the following cases: a defect in the product, or an error in sizing made on our part. Outside of these two conditions, returns will not be accepted.

sections.heading: Reporting Window
sections.body: Any issue must be reported within 48 hours of receiving your order, accompanied by a clear photo documenting the problem.

sections.heading: Resolution
sections.body: Upon approval of a return request, we will offer either an exchange for the correct item or store credit — whichever you prefer.

sections.heading: Non-Returnable Items
sections.body: Custom and personalised orders are final sale. They cannot be returned, exchanged, or refunded under any circumstances.

sections.heading: Data We Collect
sections.body: We collect only the information necessary to process your order: your name, phone number, delivery address, and order details. Nothing more.

sections.heading: How We Use Your Data
sections.body: Your data is used solely to fulfil your order and provide customer support. We do not sell, share, or transfer your personal information to any third party.

sections.heading: Communication
sections.body: All communication takes place via WhatsApp for the purpose of order coordination and support only.

sections.heading: Payment Security
sections.body: We do not store any payment data. All transactions are processed securely through the payment provider.

sections.heading: Contact
sections.body: For any privacy-related enquiries, please contact us at sudanistaa@gmail.com.

sections.heading: Delivery Area
sections.body: We deliver within the United Arab Emirates only.

sections.heading: Delivery Timeframe
sections.body: Orders are shipped within 24 hours of payment confirmation. Delivery across the UAE takes 1–3 working days, excluding Fridays and official public holidays.

sections.heading: Shipping Fees
sections.body: Shipping fees are determined at the time of order confirmation and communicated to you before finalising your purchase.

sections.heading: Tracking & Updates
sections.body: Shipping updates are sent directly via WhatsApp so you can follow your order every step of the way.

sections.heading: Order Confirmation
sections.body: Orders are confirmed only after payment has been completed successfully. Confirmation is not issued prior to payment.

sections.heading: Pricing
sections.body: All prices are listed in UAE Dirhams (AED). Prices are subject to change without prior notice.

sections.heading: Customer Responsibility
sections.body: The customer is responsible for the accuracy of all information provided at the time of ordering, including name, address, and contact details.

sections.heading: Out-of-Stock Orders
sections.body: In the rare event that an ordered item is out of stock, the order will be cancelled and a full refund will be issued.

sections.heading: Custom Orders
sections.body: Personalised and custom orders cannot be cancelled or returned once confirmed. Please review all details carefully before confirming.

sections.heading: Changes to Terms
sections.body: We reserve the right to update or modify these terms at any time. Continued use of our store constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.

home.featuredEmptyDescription: Check back soon for the latest new arrivals.
home.ctaDescription: Every piece is selected with precision - designed to feel luxurious, look premium, and last beyond seasons.

items.a: We offer everyday clothing for children, as well as accessories — everything your little ones need for daily wear.
Our sizing runs from S all the way up to 6XL, so we cater to a wide range of body types and ages.

items.q: How do I place an order?
items.a: Orders are placed directly through our online store. Simply browse, add to cart, and check out in a few easy steps.
Delivery typically takes 1–3 days, depending on your location and the shipping option selected at checkout.
Custom orders are available. Please note that customised items are final sale and cannot be returned or exchanged.

items.q: What payment methods do you accept?
items.a: We accept Visa, Apple Pay, and Google Pay — all processed securely through our website.
Yes, international shipping is available. Please reach out via our WhatsApp number to coordinate your order.

footer.description: Everyday clothing for children, crafted with care. Sizes S to 6XL, delivered across the UAE.
